summary: Feature 1 (Apply to file): Added 'Apply' button to code blocks when the language hint contains a file path (e.g. ```typescript:src/foo.ts). Rendered in markdown.ts code-header, wired via ava:apply-code custom event dispatched from MarkdownContent.tsx, handled in App.tsx with Tauri invoke('write_file'). Feature 2 (Rich clipboard copy): Updated MessageActions.handleCopy to use ClipboardItem API — writes both text/html (rendered markdown) and text/plain to clipboard with plain text fallback. Feature 3 (Pre-compaction dimming): Already fully implemented — CompactionDivider component, .compaction-pre CSS class at 50% opacity (hover 75%), compactionIndex signal from useSession, and MessageList.tsx renders the divider + dim wrapper. No changes needed. Feature 4 (Large diff guard): Added LARGE_DIFF_LINE_THRESHOLD=500 constant, isLargeDiff memo, large diffs stay collapsed by default (isSmallDiff && !isLargeDiff), and show 'Show large diff (N lines)' label in header. Feature 5 (Truncation detection): Added isTruncated memo in MessageBubble that checks if completed assistant messages lack terminal punctuation, shows 'Continue generation' button (wired to onRegenerate) for the last message only.
